workflow.title: Plate QC transfer with adaptive readout
workflow.summary: An agent inspects deck state, moves liquid from a source plate to an assay plate, reads absorbance, and records the next decision.

surfaces.agent_visible_task: Transfer 50 uL from source_plate:A1 to assay_plate:B1, read OD600, and continue only if the readout is inside the control band.

eval_use.debug: Inspect exact tool requests, observations, and decision context.
eval_use.audit: Show what the agent asked instruments to do and what observations it received.
eval_use.regression: Compare later agents against the same task and verifier.
eval_use.practice_world: Use the real trace as ground truth for a resettable fake workflow.

synthetic_environment_use.purpose: Create a resettable workflow-level environment from verified traces and domain rules.
synthetic_environment_use.not_claimed: This does not simulate chemistry or biology perfectly.
synthetic_environment_use.claimed: It can replay tool/API semantics, state ledgers, observations, constraints, and verifier checks for cheap agent practice.
